panels.title: Percentage of Total Processing Time by Endpoint
Percentage of Total Processing Time by Endpoint (without GET /job/:id)

targets.expr:
sum by (slice) (
  label_replace(
    rate(
      http_request_auth_status_total{auth="authorized", account_id!="", kube_deployment_name=~"$application", kube_namespace_name="$namespace" }[$__range]
    ),
    "slice", "$1",
    "account_id", "(.*)"
  )
  or
  label_replace(
    (
      rate(http_request_auth_status_total{auth="authorized", account_id="", kube_deployment_name=~"$application", kube_namespace_name="$namespace"}[$__range])
    ),
    "slice", "unknown",
    "auth", ".*"
  )
)

list.name: application
list.query: Gateway : channels-service, Device Service : device-service, IQP Service : iqp-service
